get.summary: Get a list of all user accounts

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Set to true to include archived accounts

get.summary: Get a specific account by ID

post.summary: Upload a file and attach it to a transaction
post.description: Accepted formats: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, pdf. Maximum file size: 5 MB.

delete.summary: Delete an attachment and remove the file from storage

patch.summary: Update name, avatar, or settings of the authenticated user

delete.summary: Permanently delete the authenticated user account
delete.description: Requires current_password confirmation. All Sanctum tokens are revoked before deletion.

get.summary: Get all budgets for the authenticated user

post.summary: Create a new budget for a category

get.summary: Get a specific budget with current spending progress
Get all categories for the authenticated user
Get a specific category by ID

delete.summary: Delete a category (cannot delete default categories)

403.description: Forbidden — default categories cannot be deleted

get.summary: Get dashboard summary for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns total balance, monthly income/expense, chart data, recent transactions, and top spending categories.

post.summary: Send a password reset link to the given email address
post.description: Always returns 200 to avoid revealing whether the email exists in the system (prevents user enumeration).

200.description: Reset link sent (or silently ignored if email not found)

message.example: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

get.summary: Get all savings goals for the authenticated user
Get a specific goal with all deposits

200.description: Goal details with deposit history and progress

patch.summary: Update a goal name, deadline, or status

post.summary: Add a deposit to a savings goal
post.description: When current_amount reaches target_amount the goal status is automatically set to completed.

200.description: Goal updated with new deposit applied

get.summary: Get all recurring transactions for the authenticated user

post.summary: Create a new recurring transaction template
post.description: Transfers are not supported for recurring transactions.

get.summary: Get aggregated transaction report with optional filters
get.description: Returns income/expense summary totals and a breakdown by category. All filters are optional.

200.description: Report data with summary and category breakdown

get.summary: Export report — coming in Stage 10 (PDF / Excel / CSV via queue)

message.example: Export feature is planned for Stage 10. Will support PDF, Excel, and CSV formats.

post.summary: Reset user password using the token from the reset email
post.description: On success, all existing Sanctum tokens are revoked so the user must log in again on all devices.

message.example: Password has been reset successfully. Please log in again.

get.summary: Get all tags for the authenticated user
Get a specific tag by ID

patch.summary: Update a tag name or color

get.summary: Get a paginated list of transactions with optional filters

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by field. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -amount)

post.summary: Create a new transaction (income, expense, or transfer)

get.summary: Get a specific transaction with relations (account, category, tags, attachments)

patch.summary: Update a transaction (transfer transactions are locked)
